provenance: A7 remediation — this policy strengthening was previously written IN-PLACE into the frozen coordination/governance/field_ownership.json (drift preserved in coordination/evidence/a7_drift_20260719/frozen_target_drift.patch). Re-homed here as a composed extension; the frozen file is byte-restored to the d8d5139a baseline.
doctrine: Governance-before-Capability. This extension ADDS obligations on top of the frozen field-ownership constitution; it can never relax it, and it cannot change its own authorization status.

builder: Governance Proof Record for material decisions/completions — HELM Engineering Doctrine v1.0 (EDR-0006); a decision without a valid Proof Record is UNKNOWN, not complete

enforcement: backend/helm_runtime/extensions/constitutional_gate.py (govern_decision) + backend/security/helm_conmon.py governance_coverage; a material event lacking a GOVERNED Proof Record is a FINDING, never silently green
